name: Light Pill #4 - The Echo Keeper
description: The Echo Keeper - A glowing capsule that captures forgotten sounds and gives voice to silent memories. Part of the Light Pill Project: surreal, mystical experiences for those who embrace the unknown.

attributes.value: Every sound ever made still exists somewhere, waiting to be heard again.
You must capture three distinct echoes in your listening horn - laughter from yesterday, a secret from last week, and a promise from long ago. Then release them in reverse order.
Must be taken in a place with natural acoustics

properties.ai_prompt: Mystical fashion editorial of The Echo Keeper in an underground cavern with glowing singing crystals, wearing a copper-woven tunic with tiny bells along the hem, holding an ancient brass listening horn to their ear. Bronze Resonance aura with Reverberating energy, soft leather moccasins, cinematic lighting that captures sound waves as visible ripples in the air, 8K, hyperdetailed with crystalline reflections and acoustic energy patterns.
